summary: Device-Asset Linking Feature Testing - Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend: UI verified with Geräte-Import tab showing stats (216 devices, 1 with asset, 215 without), device table with correct columns, TSRID asset types in dropdown, and warranty month selection.
seed_data_creation: Device AAHC01-01 was pre-linked with Asset AST-AAHC01-01 as mentioned in context
context_for_next_testing_agent: Device-Asset linking fully functional. Device import tab shows stats and allows creating assets from devices with TSRID types and warranty month calculation.

1_devices_all_endpoint.description: GET /api/asset-mgmt/devices/all - List all devices with asset status
details: Returns devices with asset_id field
Stats show: total_devices (216), with_asset (1), without_asset (215)
Filters: has_asset (yes/no/all), search, tenant_id
Creates asset with ID pattern AST-{device_id}
Links asset to device (sets linked_device_id)
Updates device with asset_id reference
Returns error if device already has asset
Device stores asset_id field
Asset stores linked_device_id field
GET /api/asset-mgmt/assets/{id}/with-device enriches with device data

4_geraete_import_tab.description: Frontend: Geräte-Import tab in Rollout Management
details: Tab shows badge with unlinked device count (215)
3 stats cards: Gesamt Geräte (216), Mit Asset (1), Ohne Asset (215)
Filter dropdown: Alle Geräte, Ohne Asset, Mit Asset
Columns: Device-ID, Asset-ID, Location, Stadt, SN-PC, SN-SC, Status, Aktionen
Linked asset shows as green clickable link (AST-AAHC01-01)
Unlinked devices show 'Kein Asset' and '+ Asset' button

6_tsrid_asset_types.description: TSRID Tablet and TSRID Scanner asset types
details: tsrid_tablet in ASSET_TYPES array
tsrid_scanner in ASSET_TYPES array
Dropdown in Create Asset modal shows both options
Assets can be created with these types
Kaufdatum (purchase date) + Garantie Monate = warranty_until
Dropdown options: 12, 24, 36, 48, 60 Monate
Calculation: purchaseDate.setMonth(purchaseDate.getMonth() + months)
Same logic works for license_activation_date + license_months

8_asset_navigation.description: Clicking linked Asset-ID navigates to asset
details: Green asset link in device table is clickable
Clicking navigates to Assets tab with search filter applied

test_classes: TestDeviceAssetListing (4 tests) - Device listing with filters and stats
TestAssetCreationFromDevice (3 tests) - Create asset from device endpoint
TestWarrantyDateCalculation (3 tests) - Warranty date with 12/24/36 months

ui_elements_verified: 3 stats cards (Gesamt Geräte, Mit Asset, Ohne Asset)
Filter dropdown (Alle Geräte, Ohne Asset, Mit Asset)
Create Asset modal with TSRID types and warranty months
